title: cynosurus effusus var. fertilis
intro: Cynosurus effusus var. fertilis, also known as dwarf dog's-tail grass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Cynosurus effusus var. fertilis is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
